name: Ronnie Bedford
abstract: Ronnie Bedford (June 2, 1931 – December 20, 2014) was an American jazz drummer and professor. Born in Bridgeport, Connecticut, he played percussion for Louis Prima and later the Benny Goodman Quintet.

about_quotes.speaker: Carmen Leggio
about_quotes.evidence: You remember Ronnie Bedford, the drummer? ... on the octet was Warren Vache, Urbie Green, Bucky Pizzarelli and Hank Jones, Slam Stewart and Benny. ... he plays with it.
about_quotes.doc_title: Carmen Leggio interviewed by Monk Rowe, Tarrytown, New York, October 31, 1998
